task_name: DQN Reinforcement Learning Algorithm Migration from TensorFlow to PyTorch

subtask1.query: Please read the task instructions in workspace/query.md, refer to the original TensorFlow DQN code in the context/ directory, complete the migration from TensorFlow to PyTorch, and save the output files in the current directory.
deliverables: dqn_torch.py - Complete DQN implementation using PyTorch + Gymnasium (single file)
Training visualization image files (*.png) - Reward curves, loss curves, etc.
